sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal. Arabic يَأَسَ and transp. اُيِسَ to despair, to be cast down in spirit.

Niphal id., followed by מִן to desist from any person on thing. 1Sa 27:1, וְנֹואַשׁ מִמֶּנִּי שָׁאוּל לְבַקְּשֵׁנִי עֹוד “Saul will desist from me to seek me any more.” Part. נֹואָשׁ void of hope, Job 6:26. Neutr. to be without hope, to be in vain, Isa 57:10 Jer 2:25 18:12 .

Piel inf. יָאֵשׁ, followed by לִבֹּו to give over to despair Ecc 2:20.
